texts.text:  Several process arrangements were made in order to prevent crystallization

texts.label: list_item

texts.text:  the solvent is highly stable and do not lead to measurable loss of active substance due to degradation

texts.label: text
texts.orig: FINNCAP: CCS nachgerüstet zu Meri Pori Anlage
texts.text: FINNCAP: CCS nachgerüstet zu Meri Pori Anlage

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  Aim to reduce CO 2 emissions with ~1,25 million ton/year, as well as NOx and SOx emissions
texts.text:  Aim to reduce CO 2 emissions with ~1,25 million ton/year, as well as NOx and SOx emissions

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  CO2 will be captured in Meri-Pori, transported abroad for storage and sequestered in geological formations
texts.text:  CO2 will be captured in Meri-Pori, transported abroad for storage and sequestered in geological formations

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Promising properties of the Siemens POSTCAP CO 2 capture process using AAS were confirmed from actual pilot plant operation
texts.text: Promising properties of the Siemens POSTCAP CO 2 capture process using AAS were confirmed from actual pilot plant operation

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · A CO2 capture rate of 90% and above was achieved.
texts.text: A CO2 capture rate of 90% and above was achieved.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · The existing AAS process simulation model was validated.
texts.text: The existing AAS process simulation model was validated.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Applicability of stainless steel 1.4571 (316L) as preferred construction material was confirmed.
texts.text: Applicability of stainless steel 1.4571 (316L) as preferred construction material was confirmed.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · An efficiency drop of only 8.5 %-pts (including CO 2 compression to 200 bar and auxiliary power demand) can be achieved.
texts.text: An efficiency drop of only 8.5 %-pts (including CO 2 compression to 200 bar and auxiliary power demand) can be achieved.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · The amino-acid salt is stable against thermal stress and oxygen environments which appear under real operation conditions.
texts.text: The amino-acid salt is stable against thermal stress and oxygen environments which appear under real operation conditions.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Solvent stability and low emissions have been experimentally confirmed.
texts.text: Solvent stability and low emissions have been experimentally confirmed.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · No mentionable amounts of emissions could be found.
texts.text: No mentionable amounts of emissions could be found.
